steps.title: Convert the percentage to a fraction
steps.content: To find $20\%$ of \$440$, we express the percentage as a fraction: $20\% = \frac{20}{100} = \frac{1}{5}$.

steps.title: Multiply the fraction by the whole
steps.content: Now we multiply: $$\frac{1}{5} \times 440 = \frac{440}{5} = 88.$$ That matches choice B — B is correct.
